summary: The user is hosting a party and seeks recipe ideas for using their new slow cooker purchased from Bed Bath & Beyond. They finalize ingredients for a Spinach and Artichoke Dip and inquire about cleaning and maintaining their slow cooker, as well as tips for reheating leftovers safely.
facts: The user purchased a new slow cooker from Bed Bath & Beyond during a sale. The user is hosting a party this weekend. The user plans to make Spinach and Artichoke Dip for the party. The user has mozzarella-Parmesan cheese in their fridge for the dip. The user is interested in easy and healthy breakfast recipes for their slow cooker. The user is looking for tips on how to reheat leftovers safely in their slow cooker. The user is excited to try out their new slow cooker and experiment with different recipes.
